name: APC Smart-UPS SMX 1000VA 2U Tower/Rack Convertible UPS - Line Interactive - 3 Hour Recharge - 8 Minute Stand-by - 120V - 8x NEMA 5-15R - SmartConnect port - Network card - Extended Runtime (SMX1000CNC)
shortName: APC Smart-UPS SMX 1000VA 2U Tower/Rack Convertible UPS - Line
description: A 1000VA line-interactive UPS system with tower/rack convertible design and extended runtime capability, ideal for small server rooms and network closets.
